name: forge
description: Forge — self-hosted AI coding studio (agentic Bolt.new / Claude Code style IDE)

scripts.setup: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix backend install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix frontend install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
